title: GECOM10 - Supplier Master Data

EnumTRTEXC.description: Movement processing code / 1 = Create, 2 = Modify or Create, 9 = Cancellation

EnumTYPFOU.description_es: Tipo de proveedor / 1 = Industrial, 2 = Mayorista, 3 = Plataforma (transferencias)

EnumGSTAVI.description: Shipping notice management / 0 = no notice management, 1 = notices managed without disputes, 2 = notices managed with disputes

EnumGSTRCP.description: Radio frequency receiving management type / 0 = No management, 1 = Product code management, 2 =  EAN 13/14 management, 3 = EAN 128 management

EnumGSTRCP.description_en: Radio frequency receiving management type / 0 = No management, 1 = Product code management, 2 =  EAN 13/14 management, 3 = EAN 128 management

EnumCODENL.description: Collection code / 0 = Without collection, 1 = With collection

EnumCODENL.description_en: Collection code / 0 = Without collection, 1 = With collection

EnumPEREMB.description: Periodicity of packaging sales / 0 = Manual balance, 1 = At midday and at the end of the month, 2 = At the end of the month
